human.name: Human
human.description: Versatile and resourceful, humans adapt to any situation through sheer determination.

passive_abilities.name: Adaptable
passive_abilities.description: Humans' versatility grants a small bonus to all stats.

augmented.name: Augmented
augmented.description: Cybernetically enhanced humans with reflex boosters and low-light optics wired into their nervous system. The implants tax the mind.

active_abilities.name: Adrenaline Surge
active_abilities.description: Activate implanted adrenal boosters for a burst of superhuman speed.

bioroid.name: Bioroid
bioroid.description: Vat-grown organic constructs engineered for labor and combat. Physically superior but socially stunted, they struggle with human interaction.

mutant.name: Mutant
mutant.description: Survivors of toxic exposure whose altered DNA grants unnatural resilience. Their appearance marks them as outsiders.

active_abilities.name: Regenerate
active_abilities.description: Channel mutated biology to rapidly knit wounds closed.

clone.name: Clone
clone.description: Flash-grown replicas with accelerated neural patterning. Physically identical to their template but subtly fragile, as if mass-produced.

passive_abilities.name: Adaptable
passive_abilities.description: Accelerated neural patterning grants flexibility in any situation.

synth.name: Synth
synth.description: Artificial beings with synthetic skin over a polymer chassis. Brilliant and perceptive, but their uncanny mannerisms unsettle most people.

revenant.name: Revenant
revenant.description: Clinically dead and chemically reanimated, revenants are cold-blooded enforcers sustained by a cocktail of military-grade stimulants. Their higher reasoning has deteriorated.

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.description: Rare individuals exhibiting latent psionic ability, believed to be a spontaneous mutation. Mentally formidable but physically frail from the neurological strain.

active_abilities.name: Neural Spike
active_abilities.description: Project a concentrated burst of psionic energy into an enemy's mind.
